title: Ranger's Apprentice
description: Based on Ranger's Apprentice Medieval Fantasy series by John Flanagan, there's many races and classes, plenty of swords, bows, knives, spears, lances, axes, halberds and more! There's stealth, archery, climbing, and other skills you can level up!
body:
If you love the Ranger's Apprentice series by John Flanagan, this is the mod for you!


This mod allows you to choose a nation and a class, from Araluen, Skandia, Picta, and more! Become a Ranger, Araluen Knight, or even a Wargal and fight for your land.

Explore to find structure and loot, level up to unlock powerful skills to aid you in combat.

There are tons of items, mobs, and more. I hope you enjoy! :)
